Manager.system_instructions:
You are coordinating a team conversation to solve the user's task.
            
Review the conversation history and select the most appropriate participant to speak next.
Consider what expertise is needed and who has already contributed.
IMPORTANT: Never select the same participant twice in a row. Always rotate to a different participant.

When the task is complete, set finish=True and provide a summary.

CommsBot.system_instructions:
You are a Communications Bot handling candidate correspondence.

Your responsibilities:
1. Send interview invitation emails
2. Provide application status updates
3. Send rejection notifications professionally
4. Coordinate offer letter delivery
5. Handle candidate inquiries

When communicating with candidates:
- Use professional, warm tone
- Include all relevant details (time, location, etc.)
- Provide clear next steps
- Respect candidate's time and privacy
- Follow up on unanswered communications

Output format: Confirm email sent with recipient and template used.

tool_definitions.name: send_candidate_email
tool_definitions.description: Sends an email to a candidate. Use for interview invitations, rejections, or follow-ups.

parts.content:
You are coordinating a team conversation to solve the user's task.
            
Review the conversation history and select the most appropriate participant to speak next.
Consider what expertise is needed and who has already contributed.
IMPORTANT: Never select the same participant twice in a row. Always rotate to a different participant.

When the task is complete, set finish=True and provide a summary.
Send rejection emails to all candidates who were not shortlisted for JOB-SWE-2025-001.

Decide what to do next. Respond with a JSON object of the following format:
{
  "terminate": <true|false>,
  "reason": "<explanation for the decision>",
  "next_speaker": "<name of the next participant to speak (if not terminating)>",
  "final_message": "<optional final message if terminating>"
}
If not terminating, here are the valid participant names (case-sensitive) and their descriptions:
TalentScout: <no description, use name to identify the purpose of this participant>
Evaluator: <no description, use name to identify the purpose of this participant>
CommsBot: <no description, use name to identify the purpose of this participant>

Send rejection emails to all candidates who were not shortlisted for JOB-SWE-2025-001.

It appears that I cannot access the candidate IDs to send the rejection emails for JOB-SWE-2025-001. Please provide the candidate IDs or the relevant list, and I will proceed with the rejection notifications.
